mapper.select:
select * from tea_choice_question tcq left join tea_choice_option tco on tcq.question_id = tco.question_id where tcq.question_id in
#{random}

select tco.option_label,tcq.question_id from tea_choice_question tcq left join tea_choice_option tco on tcq.correct_option_id = tco.option_id where tcq.question_id in
#{id}
